EmailTemplate.name: AN - Contract - Promote job board to candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: New contract opportunities availale for you
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!User.FirstName},
Thank you for taking the time to apply with us. While we regret to inform you that we won’t be moving forward with your application for the [Job title] role at this time, we do have other opportunities that we think better matches your skills and experience.
If you would like to discuss these opportunities further, please book in a time with one of our recruiters or give our friendly staff a call on 1300 034 494.
We are looking forward to continuing your journey with Alliance Nursing!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
